summary: First testing pass on Institute Enquiry CRM. Backend: 27/27 pytest tests pass covering auth (5 roles + change-password + forgot-password with restore), Courses/Batches/Lead-Sources CRUD, Users role restrictions (admin cannot delete, super_admin can), Enquiries CRUD + duplicate detection + pagination + search + role guards (faculty forbidden), Follow-ups (status/next-followup propagation), Admissions (auto admission_no, no double-admit, status flip), Dashboard stats + charts + counsellor scoping, Reports summary. Frontend: Login (prefilled admin), dashboard stat cards + all 5 charts, sidebar navigation to Enquiries/Follow-ups/Admissions/Reports/Settings, list rows rendering, logout via avatar menu, and reception role restrictions all verified. Two frontend defects found: (1) some form fields' data-testids not resolvable via Playwright even though set via MUI inputProps; (2) DOB and Enquiry Date/Next Follow-up date fields visibly overlap other adjacent Select fields on /enquiries/new.

minor.issue: Uses is_deleted==False filter which is fine, but consider returning also for soft-deleted duplicates for admin awareness
No token/OTP flow – any anonymous caller who knows an email can reset a password. Acceptable per user's Core-first scope, but should be flagged for production hardening.
admissions total is global for non-counsellors; conversion_rate for counsellor uses global admissions/scoped total which skews rate. Consider scoping admissions when role==counsellor.

ui_bugs.issue: DOB, Enquiry Date, Next Follow-up date inputs visibly overlap with adjacent Select (Gender / Lead Source / Assign Counsellor) fields — placeholder texts 'mm/dd/yyyy' and truncated Select labels render on top of each other, breaking usability.
Using browser's default HTML5 date picker (<input type=date>) instead of an MUI DatePicker — inconsistent UI and root cause of the overlap.

React console warning stream: 'React does not recognize the `InputProps`/`SelectProps`/`primaryTypographyProps` prop on a DOM element'. Some `SelectProps`/`InputProps` are being spread onto raw DOM. Not fatal but pollutes console and hints at prop mis-forwarding.

Playwright cannot resolve [data-testid='enq-form-student-name'] and [data-testid='enq-form-mobile'] on /enquiries/new despite being set via inputProps on TextField. Might be linked to inputProps not being forwarded (see prop-forwarding warnings above).

integration_issues.issue: [data-testid='enq-search-input'] intermittently not resolvable by Playwright even though input is visible; fallback via placeholder works. Same prop-forwarding suspicion.

issues: Overlapping date + select fields (Gender vs DOB, Enquiry Date vs Next Follow-up), form layout breaks visually
Native browser date picker used instead of MUI DatePicker

action_items: Fix EnquiryForm date fields: replace native <input type='date'> with MUI DatePicker (or fix grid so labels don't collide with adjacent Select fields).

Investigate why data-testids on TextField.inputProps are not being propagated to the DOM in some pages (EnquiryForm student_name/mobile, occasionally EnquiryList search). Verify MUI version in package.json and prop naming.
Clean up React console warnings by removing misspread InputProps/SelectProps/primaryTypographyProps on DOM elements.
Optional: harden /api/auth/forgot-password with an OTP or email token flow before production.
Optional: scope Admission counts by counsellor for /api/dashboard/stats when role==counsellor.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 700+ lines — split into routers (auth.py, enquiries.py, admissions.py, dashboard.py, reports.py, settings/*.py) to improve maintainability.
seed_defaults() is idempotent for users (checks email exists) — good — but does not update password when hash format/algo changes; acceptable for MVP.
hash uses bcrypt (verified $2b$ output). JWT_SECRET moved to .env (strong 256-bit hex). Good.
Enquiry list endpoint does not exclude Mongo _id (SQLite here – not applicable).
Login endpoint accepts email case-insensitively (lower()) — good.
Dashboard stats mixes 'admissions_total' globally with counsellor-scoped 'total' → inaccurate conversion_rate for counsellor role.
No rate-limiting or brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login. Playbook recommends 5-attempt lockout — not implemented.
CORS_ORIGINS defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True — this combination is not allowed by browsers; production should set explicit origins.
Frontend Login prefills admin credentials in state (email/password inputs) — fine for demo but should be removed for production.

success_rate.frontend: ~80% (login, dashboard, navigation, role restrictions, list, logout OK; form data-testid + date overlap issues block full E2E enquiry-create/follow-up/admission via Playwright)

test_credentials: See /app/memory/test_credentials.md – all Admin@123. Verified working. Faculty and counsellor passwords changed then restored to Admin@123 during change-password / forgot-password tests.
seed_data_creation: Backend tests create a TEST_ prefixed enquiry, then soft-delete it via cleanup. Also transiently create+delete a course, batch, lead source and TEST_c1 user (super_admin deletes) — none of these should persist beyond the run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully validated via /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py — 27 tests passing in ~9s. Focus next iteration on frontend fixes: (a) EnquiryForm date fields overlap and Playwright cannot locate enq-form-student-name/mobile — priority HIGH; (b) React console 'does not recognize InputProps/SelectProps' warnings across list/detail pages; (c) verify Enquiry->Follow-up->Admission end-to-end flow in browser once form is fixed. To re-run backend regression: `cd /app/backend && python -m pytest tests/backend_test.py -v`. Frontend URL: https://lead-master-22.preview.emergentagent.com. Login always prefilled with admin.
rca of the issue: Overlap of date fields on /enquiries/new: EnquiryForm.js uses <TextField type='date' InputLabelProps={{shrink:true}}> alongside MUI Select fields in the same Grid row. The native date picker widget renders with its own placeholder text ('mm/dd/yyyy') which visually collides with the Select's truncated display value (e.g. 'Gr..', 'L.x'). Root cause: mixed use of native HTML5 date input with MUI Select inside compact Grid columns; recommended fix is to switch to @mui/x-date-pickers DatePicker or widen the grid item to avoid overlap. Data-testid resolution issue: MUI's TextField requires `inputProps` (lowercase) to forward attributes to the underlying <input>. The React DOM warnings ('React does not recognize InputProps/SelectProps') indicate some capitalized props are being passed through to DOM — this suggests a prop-forwarding regression somewhere (possibly a wrapping component or a MUI version mismatch) that could also be preventing the lowercase `inputProps` testid from reaching certain inputs. Recommend inspecting rendered DOM (devtools) for these specific inputs to confirm whether data-testid actually appears in the HTML.
